mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, alba_id AS albaId, schedule_time AS scheduleTime FROM schedule WHERE schedule_time = #{scheduleTime}

SELECT a.alba_id AS albaId, s.schedule_id AS scheduleId, w.work_id AS workId, w.work_in AS workIn, w.work_out AS workOut FROM alba a INNER JOIN schedule s ON a.alba_id = s.alba_id LEFT JOIN work w ON a.alba_id = w.alba_id AND DATE(work_in) = #{date} WHERE s.schedule_time = #{scheduleTime} ORDER BY a.alba_id
SELECT DISTINCT w.alba_id AS albaId, w.work_date AS workDate, w.work_in AS workIn, w.work_out AS workOut, w.work_status AS workStatus FROM work w WHERE w.alba_id = #{albaId} AND w.work_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work (alba_id, work_date, work_in, work_status) VALUES (#{albaId}, #{workDate}, #{workIn}, #{workStatus})
